title: Gilboa` #1533
definition:
Gilboa = "swollen heap"

 1) a mountain-ridge at the southeastern end of the plain of Jezreel,
    site of the death of Saul and Jonathan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gilboa = "swollen heap"

 1) a mountain-ridge at the southeastern end of the plain of Jezreel,
    site of the death of Saul and Jonathan

    NASB:  a mountain in N. Isr.
